criteriaResults.details: PASS -- Volcano palette constants verified: COLORS.volcano.darkStone='#2A1A1A', darkRed='#8B2A1A', lavaOrange='#FF6A2A', moltenYellow='#FFD43A'. Renderer uses these colors for World 4 tile drawing (_drawVolcanoSolidTile at renderer.js:2400). Volcano tiles are visually distinct from forest, desert, and tundra as confirmed by screenshot inspection.

PASS -- Camera.parallaxLayers.length === 4 (>= 3 required). Four layers with volcano palette colors at camera.js:52-57. Layers use darkStone, shadow, darkRed, lavaOrange, moltenYellow. Screenshot confirms volcanic mountain silhouettes against a red-orange gradient sky. Renderer._renderVolcanoParallax() at renderer.js:2299 handles volcano-specific parallax rendering.

PASS -- Renderer._emberParticles array exists and Renderer.updateAndRenderEmbers function confirmed. Ember particle system at renderer.js:2494 creates particles with volcano palette colors (lavaOrange, moltenYellow, darkRed). Particles drift upward with random lateral movement. Screenshots show visible orange/red ember particles floating across all three volcano stages.

PASS -- TILE_LAVA constant = 15 defined in constants.js:28. TILES.LAVA = 15 also available. 47 lava tiles found in stage 4-1. Physics.js handles lava damage at lines 173 and 215: 'if (tile === TILE_HAZARD || tile === TILE_LAVA)' triggers player damage. Level.update() at level.js:1963-1969 also handles rising lava damage via Player.takeDamage(). Lava visually animated with orange/yellow bubbling surface in renderer.js:2458-2494.

PASS -- Level.lavaLevel initialized to 40, risingLava=40, lavaRiseSpeed=12, lavaDirection=1, lavaMinLevel=40, lavaMaxLevel=120 in stage 4-1. Level.update(dt) at level.js:1949-1970 oscillates lava between min and max levels. Tested: lava level changed from 46.2 to 70.2 over 120 update calls (2 seconds simulated). Lava also damages player when submerged (line 1965-1968).

PASS -- 5 chain swing points in stage 4-2 (>= 2 required). Each chain has x, y, length=160, chainLength=160, canGrab=true, grabbed=false, angle=0, angularVel=0. Chain swing physics implemented in Level.update() at level.js:1972-1986 with pendulum simulation (gravity, damping, angular velocity). Chains shared via Level.chains, Level.swingPoints, Level.chainPoints aliases.

PASS -- 4 Magma Slimes in stage 4-1. health=1 (>= 1), splitOnDeath=true, splits=true, splitCount=2. Behavior='patrol'. _getDefaults at enemies.js:313 defines: width=24, height=20, speed=0.8. Enemy spawn method at line 79-82 sets split properties. Visually rendered with volcano palette colors (lavaOrange, darkRed).

PASS -- 4 Fire Bats in stage 4-1. health=1 (>= 1), behavior='erratic', flightTimer and swoopTimer defined. _getDefaults at enemies.js:316 defines: width=22, height=18, speed=1.5. Erratic flight behavior confirmed. Visually rendered as bat-like creatures with red/orange colors.

PASS -- 3 Obsidian Knights in stage 4-2. health=2 (>= 2), hasShield=true, shielded=true, frontalShield=true, shieldDirection=-1. Behavior='patrol_shield'. _getDefaults at enemies.js:319 defines: width=26, height=30, speed=0.6. Shield mechanic requires attacking from behind.

PASS -- Stage 4-1 'Lava Fields': width=125 (>= 120), height=20, spawnX=64, spawnY=480, exitX=3904, bossData={type:'lava_serpent'}, bossArenaX=3040, 8 enemies (4 magma_slime + 4 fire_bat). Level built by _buildStage4_1() at level.js:1993.

PASS -- Stage 4-2 'Forge of Chains': width=145 (>= 140), height=20, spawnX=64, spawnY=480, exitX=4544, bossData={type:'iron_warden'}, bossArenaX=3872, 8 enemies (2 magma_slime + 2 fire_bat + 3 obsidian_knight + 1 magma_slime). Level built by _buildStage4_2() at level.js:2143.

PASS -- Stage 4-3 'Caldera': width=155 (>= 150), height=20, spawnX=64, spawnY=480, exitX=4864, bossData={type:'dragon_caldera'}, bossArenaX=4032, 12 enemies with all 3 types: magma_slime (4), fire_bat (4), obsidian_knight (4). Level built by _buildStage4_3() at level.js:2299.

PASS -- Lava Serpent boss: type='lava_serpent', maxHealth=7, health=7, name='Lava Serpent'. Defined in enemies.js:145-149. Boss spawns with submerged=true, emergeTimer=0, platformDestroyTimer=0. _updateLavaSerpent at enemies.js:1998 implements emerge-from-lava mechanic and platform destruction (line 2017-2025). HUD.bossName set to 'Lava Serpent'.

PASS -- Iron Warden boss: type='iron_warden', maxHealth=7, health=7, name='Iron Warden'. Defined in enemies.js:150-154. Boss has chainTimer, slamTimer, anchorActive properties. _updateIronWarden at enemies.js:2070 implements chain anchor attack pattern. HUD.bossName set to 'Iron Warden'.

PASS -- Dragon of the Caldera boss: type='dragon_caldera', maxHealth=11, health=11, name='Dragon of the Caldera', phase=1, phases=[1,2]. Defined in enemies.js:155-159. Has breathTimer, diveTimer, flying properties. 2-phase fight confirmed: setting health to 40% (4 HP) and running update transitions phase from 1 to 2. Phase transition at enemies.js:1163-1164 triggers at health <= floor(maxHealth*0.5) = 5.

PASS -- Boss vulnerability windows verified for Lava Serpent. When boss.vulnerable=false: attack did not reduce health (7 -> 7). When boss.vulnerable=true: attack reduced health by 1 (7 -> 6). checkPlayerAttackCollisions respects the vulnerable flag at enemies.js. Same framework pattern as prior sprints.

PASS -- Boss phase transition verified for Lava Serpent. Phase check at enemies.js:1163: 'if (b.health <= Math.floor(b.maxHealth * 0.5) && b.phase === 1)' triggers phase 2. Tested: after advancing boss past intro state and setting health to 2 (< floor(7*0.5)=3), updateBoss correctly transitions phase from 1 to 2. Phase 2 modifies attack patterns (faster, additional attacks).

PASS -- Boss defeat verified for Lava Serpent. Setting health=1 with vulnerable=true, then attacking: health reduced to 0, boss state becomes 'dying'. Death handling in enemies.js triggers death animation. GameState._checkExitZone at states.js:336 transitions to STAGE_COMPLETE when boss is null and player reaches exit.

PASS -- Collectibles verified for all volcano stages. Stage 4-1: 22 coins (matches), 2 health pickups. Stage 4-2: 26 coins (matches), 2 health pickups. Stage 4-3: 32 coins (matches), 3 health pickups. All stages have >= 1 health pickup. Coin positions defined in level.js with explicit coordinate arrays.

PASS -- Enemy counts verified: Stage 4-1: 8 enemies (>= 3), Stage 4-2: 8 enemies (>= 3), Stage 4-3: 12 enemies (>= 3). Enemies positioned within level geometry via tile-coordinate-based spawn positions in enemySpawns arrays.

PASS -- 2 valve/lever puzzle elements in stage 4-2 at level.js:2246-2249. First is type 'valve' at col 97 targeting platform movement. Second is type 'lever' at col 110 targeting gate opening. Both have activated=false initial state, x/y positions, and target definitions. Also accessible via Level.levers and Level.puzzleElements aliases.

PASS -- World 4 stages correctly gated behind World 3 completion. WorldMap._applyUnlockState at worldmap.js:160-177 enforces sequential progression: each node unlocks the next upon completion. Stages ordered 1-1 through 4-3 in WorldMap.STAGES (13 total). Stage 4-1 (index 9) only unlocks when stage 3-3 (index 8) is completed.

PASS -- Three distinct volcano level layouts confirmed. Stage 4-1: name='Lava Fields', width=125. Stage 4-2: name='Forge of Chains', width=145. Stage 4-3: name='Caldera', width=155. Each has unique tile data, enemy configurations, boss types, and level geometry. Built by separate builder methods (_buildStage4_1, _buildStage4_2, _buildStage4_3). None reuses prior world layouts.

PASS -- Boss fight trigger verified in stage 4-1. GameState._checkBossArena at states.js:308-333: when Player.x + Player.width > Level.bossArenaX, boss spawns via Enemies.spawnBoss, Camera.lockToArena is called, arena entrance is blocked with TILE_SOLID. Lava Serpent spawns at (3584, 320) with maxHealth=7. HUD.bossName='Lava Serpent'.

PASS -- Stage completion integration verified. SaveSystem exists, WorldMap.completeStage function exists, GameState.setupStageComplete function exists. GameState._checkExitZone at states.js:336-355 triggers STAGE_COMPLETE transition when boss is null and player reaches exit. setupStageComplete at states.js:140-148 records completion via WorldMap.completeStage with time and coin data.

PASS -- Forest regression intact. Stage 1-1: width=85 (>=80), 5 enemies. Stage 1-2: width=125 (>=120), 7 enemies. Stage 1-3: width=155 (>=150), 8 enemies. Forest boss HPs: 1-1=5 (Elder Shroomba), 1-2=6 (Vine Mother), 1-3=7 (Stag King). All correct. Forest tile palette and parallax rendering code unchanged.

PASS -- Desert regression intact. Stage 2-1: width=110 (>=100), 7 enemies. Stage 2-2: width=135 (>=130), 8 enemies. Stage 2-3: width=145 (>=140), 8 enemies. Desert boss HPs: 2-1=6 (Sand Wyrm), 2-2=8 (Pharaoh Specter), 2-3=12 (Hydra Cactus). All correct. Desert mechanics (quicksand, dark zones, water) code unchanged.

PASS -- Tundra regression intact. Stage 3-1: width=120 (>=115), 6 enemies. Stage 3-2: width=135 (>=130), 8 enemies. Stage 3-3: width=165 (>=160), 9 enemies. Tundra boss HPs: 3-1=7 (Frost Bear), 3-2=25 (Crystal Witch), 3-3=9 (Yeti Monarch). All correct. Tundra mechanics (ice physics, auto-scrolling, ice blocks) code unchanged.

PASS -- Player movement vocabulary intact in volcano stages. COYOTE_FRAMES=6, JUMP_BUFFER_FRAMES=8, WALL_SLIDE_SPEED defined. Player has vx, vy, state properties. Attack system (ATTACK_DURATION=9, ATTACK_RANGE=22) functional. Variable jump, wall jump (WALL_JUMP_VX=7, WALL_JUMP_VY=-10), crouch slide mechanics all present in player.js. Player.health alias added for evaluator compatibility.

PASS -- Zero JavaScript errors during page load and World 4 gameplay. Level.loadStage switch statement at level.js:107-121 handles '4-1', '4-2', '4-3' cases. Game runs at stable 60fps fixed timestep. No console errors captured during testing of all 12 stages (4 worlds x 3 stages).

regressionResults.sprint5: PASS -- Enemy framework intact (Enemies.spawn/update/render), all 3 Forest enemy types (shroomba, thornvine, barkbeetle) spawn correctly, 3 Forest bosses with correct HPs (5,6,7), all Forest stages load with correct dimensions.
regressionResults.sprint6: PASS -- Desert palette constants intact, all 3 Desert enemy types (sand_skitter, dust_devil, mummy) defined, 3 Desert bosses with correct HPs (6,8,12), all Desert stages load with correct dimensions. Quicksand, dark zones, and water mechanics code unchanged.
regressionResults.sprint7: PASS -- Tundra palette constants intact, all 3 Tundra enemy types (frost_imp, ice_golem, snow_owl) defined, 3 Tundra bosses with correct HPs (7,25,9), all Tundra stages load with correct dimensions. Ice physics, auto-scrolling, and ice block mechanics code unchanged.

designQuality.notes: Volcano tiles faithfully use the design-spec palette (#2A1A1A, #8B2A1A, #FF6A2A, #FFD43A, #4A2A2A). Multi-layer parallax with dark volcanic mountains against a red-orange gradient sky is visually striking and clearly distinct from all prior worlds. Ember particles create an atmospheric molten environment. Boss health bar follows spec layout (320px, centered, gradient fill, name label above). HUD uses Chrome colors consistently. Dark theme maintained throughout. Lava rendering with animated bubbling surface is well-executed.

codeQuality.notes: Clean separation of concerns: level.js for data, enemies.js for AI/combat, renderer.js for drawing, states.js for game flow. Follows established patterns from prior sprints. Well-organized switch-case dispatch for boss/enemy updates. Constants properly centralized. Aliases provided for test accessibility (swingPoints, chainPoints, levers). Level builder methods follow consistent pattern. ~2980 lines added across 6 source files.

featureCompleteness.notes: All 30 criteria pass. 3 volcano stages with unique layouts (125, 145, 155 tiles wide). 3 enemy types with distinct behaviors (patrol, erratic, patrol_shield). 3 bosses with correct HPs and unique mechanics. Rising lava oscillation, chain-swinging physics, valve/lever puzzles all implemented. World map integration with sequential progression. Full save system integration. Zero regressions across 9 prior stages.

originality.notes: Volcano theme introduces creative gameplay mechanics: rising lava that oscillates creating timed pressure, chain-swinging pendulum physics, valve/lever puzzles, platform-destroying Lava Serpent boss. Enemy designs are thematically fitting (Magma Slime splits on death, Fire Bat erratic flight, Obsidian Knight frontal shield). Dragon 2-phase fight is the most complex boss yet at 11 HP. Follows established template but adds meaningful mechanical variety.

userExperience.notes: Smooth state transitions. Zero JS errors in all tested scenarios. All 12 stages (4 worlds) load correctly. Correct progression gating prevents sequence-breaking. Save system properly records completions. Boss health bars clearly labeled. Ember particles and lava animations create immersive volcano atmosphere. Player movement vocabulary fully intact.

notes: Sprint 8 delivers a complete and polished Molten Volcano world (World 4) with all required content. Three distinct stages, three enemy types, three bosses, rising lava mechanics, chain-swinging, and valve puzzles are all properly implemented. The volcano visual theme is striking and well-differentiated from prior worlds. All regression tests pass across Worlds 1-3. Zero JavaScript errors. The implementation follows the established architecture patterns cleanly.
